decision_rationale: no_per_pass_fps_evidence: the GRX contract requires a per-pass FPS >= 0.95x baseline measured_local comparison before any default enablement (GRX_PLAN GRX.4/GRX.5 exit criteria / GRX_CONTRACT G-GRX-5 single_scene_fps_ratio_min=0.95), and no full baseline or per-pass benchmark comparison for cluster_store exists yet

patch_0025_writeback_is_scaffold: the cluster_store merge result is dispatched into the real Godot cluster_buffer destination while the native Godot cluster store dispatch still re-packs the whole cluster table every frame as the continuation/backstop (the shim submit also executes outside Godot's frame command order, before the frame's buffer_clear), so the candidate image cannot change (LDR visual gate max_abs=0/mean_abs=0) and the opt-in Rurix dispatch yields no measured net benefit yet

compute_merge_segment_only: the pass covers only the compute merge (store) segment of ClusterBuilderRD::bake_cluster; the cluster_render rasterization segment, the buffer clears, and the render_element_count == 0 early-out stay native permanently, GPU math parity is CPU-proven integer-exact but pending in-engine observation (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch), and in-frame command-order integration (recording into Godot's own compute list instead of the shim's out-of-band submit) is not designed
does_not_imply: replacement of the cluster_render rasterization segment, the buffer clears, or the render_element_count == 0 early-out (native permanently)
net-benefit Rurix dispatch (patch 0025 result writeback is a scaffold; the native Godot cluster store re-packs the whole cluster table every frame)

rd_native_default_enable.godot_patch: 0044(GRX-014 从 0025 scaffold 兑现为真替代)
opt_in_requirements: set rendering/rurix_accel/passes/cluster_store/backend = 2 (missing container fails closed to native)

grx025_gate.engagement_subset: 4/7 clustered omni/spot 灯场景;仅 bake_cluster 的 compute merge(store)段,光栅段/clears/count==0 early-out 留 native
